en: But a man named Ananias, with his wife Sapphira, sold a piece of property,
zh: 有一個人名叫亞拿尼亞，同他妻子撒非拉，把田產賣了。

en: and with his wife's knowledge he kept back for himself some of the proceeds and brought only a part of it and laid it at the apostles' feet.
zh: 他私底下把錢留了一部分，妻子也知道這件事。他把其餘的一部分帶來，放在使徒的腳前。

en: But Peter said, "Ananias, why has Satan filled your heart to lie to the Holy Spirit and to keep back for yourself part of the proceeds of the land?
zh: 彼得說：“亞拿尼亞，為甚麼撒但充滿了你的心，使你欺騙聖靈，私底下把賣地的錢留了一部分呢？

en: While it remained unsold, did it not remain your own? And after it was sold, was it not at your disposal? Why is it that you have contrived this deed in your heart? You have not lied to men but to God."
zh: 田地還沒有賣，不是你自己的嗎？既然賣了，所得的錢不是由你作主嗎？你為甚麼存心這樣作呢？你這不是欺騙人，而是欺騙 神。”

en: When Ananias heard these words, he fell down and breathed his last. And great fear came upon all who heard of it.
zh: 亞拿尼亞一聽見這話，就仆倒斷了氣。所有聽見的人都十分害怕。

en: The young men rose and wrapped him up and carried him out and buried him.
zh: 有幾個青年人來把他包好，抬出去埋了。

en: After an interval of about three hours his wife came in, not knowing what had happened.
zh: 大約三小時之後，亞拿尼亞的妻子進來，還不知道發生了甚麼事。

en: And Peter said to her, "Tell me whether you sold the land for so much." And she said, "Yes, for so much."
zh: 彼得問她：“你告訴我，你們賣田地的錢，就是這麼多嗎？”她說：“是的，就是這麼多。”

en: But Peter said to her, "How is it that you have agreed together to test the Spirit of the Lord? Behold, the feet of those who have buried your husband are at the door, and they will carry you out."
zh: 彼得說：“你們為甚麼串同試探主的靈呢？你看，埋你丈夫的人的腳，已經到了門口，他們也要把你抬出去。”

en: Immediately she fell down at his feet and breathed her last. When the young men came in they found her dead, and they carried her out and buried her beside her husband.
zh: 她立刻就仆倒在彼得腳前，斷了氣。那些青年人進來，發現她死了，把她也抬出去，埋在她丈夫旁邊。

en: And great fear came upon the whole church and upon all who heard of these things.
zh: 全體會眾和所有聽見這事的人，都很害怕。

en: Now many signs and wonders were regularly done among the people by the hands of the apostles. And they were all together in Solomon's Portico.
zh: 主藉著使徒的手，在民間行了許多神蹟奇事。他們都同心聚集在所羅門廊下，

en: None of the rest dared join them, but the people held them in high esteem.
zh: 其餘的人，沒有一個敢接近他們，可是民眾都很敬重他們。

en: And more than ever believers were added to the Lord, multitudes of both men and women,
zh: 信主的男男女女越來越多，

en: so that they even carried out the sick into the streets and laid them on cots and mats, that as Peter came by at least his shadow might fall on some of them.
zh: 甚至有人把病人抬到街上，放在小床和褥子上，好讓彼得經過時，至少他的身影可以落在一些人身上。

en: The people also gathered from the towns around Jerusalem, bringing the sick and those afflicted with unclean spirits, and they were all healed.
zh: 耶路撒冷周圍城市的人，也帶著病人和受污靈纏擾的，蜂擁而來，結果病人全都醫好了。

en: But the high priest rose up, and all who were with him (that is, the party of the Sadducees), and filled with jealousy
zh: 大祭司和他的同黨撒都該人都起來，滿心忌恨，

en: they arrested the apostles and put them in the public prison.
zh: 於是下手拿住使徒，把他們押在公共拘留所裡。

en: But during the night an angel of the Lord opened the prison doors and brought them out, and said,
zh: 夜間有一位天使，打開監門，把他們領出來，說：

en: "Go and stand in the temple and speak to the people all the words of this Life."
zh: “你們去，站在殿裡，把一切有關這生命的話，都講給眾民聽。”

en: And when they heard this, they entered the temple at daybreak and began to teach. Now when the high priest came, and those who were with him, they called together the council and all the senate of Israel and sent to the prison to have them brought.
zh: 使徒聽完了，就在黎明的時候，進到殿裡去教導。大祭司和他的同黨來到了，就召集了公議會和以色列人的眾長老，派人到監牢去帶使徒出來。

en: But when the officers came, they did not find them in the prison, so they returned and reported,
zh: 差役到了監裡，找不到他們，回來報告說：

en: "We found the prison securely locked and the guards standing at the doors, but when we opened them we found no one inside."
zh: “我們發現監門緊閉，獄卒也守在門外；等到開了門，裡面連一個人也找不到。”

en: Now when the captain of the temple and the chief priests heard these words, they were greatly perplexed about them, wondering what this would come to.
zh: 聖殿的守衛長和祭司長聽了這些話，覺得很困惑，不知道這件事將來會怎樣。

en: And someone came and told them, "Look! The men whom you put in prison are standing in the temple and teaching the people."
zh: 忽然有人來報告說：“你們押在監裡的那些人，正站在殿裡教導眾民呢！”

en: Then the captain with the officers went and brought them, but not by force, for they were afraid of being stoned by the people.
zh: 於是守衛長和差役去帶使徒來，不過沒有用暴力，因為怕眾民用石頭打他們。

en: And when they had brought them, they set them before the council. And the high priest questioned them,
zh: 既然帶來了，就叫他們站在公議會前。大祭司問他們：

en: saying, "We strictly charged you not to teach in this name, yet here you have filled Jerusalem with your teaching, and you intend to bring this man's blood upon us."
zh: “我們嚴厲地吩咐過你們，不准再奉這名教導。看，你們卻把你們的道理傳遍了耶路撒冷，想要把流這人的血的責任推到我們身上。”

en: But Peter and the apostles answered, "We must obey God rather than men.
zh: 彼得和眾使徒回答：“服從 神過於服從人，是應當的。

en: The God of our fathers raised Jesus, whom you killed by hanging him on a tree.
zh: 你們掛在木頭上親手殺害的耶穌，我們祖先的 神已經使他復活了。

en: God exalted him at his right hand as Leader and Savior, to give repentance to Israel and forgiveness of sins.
zh: 神把他高舉在自己的右邊，作元首作救主，把悔改的心賜給了以色列人，使他們罪得赦免。

en: And we are witnesses to these things, and so is the Holy Spirit, whom God has given to those who obey him."
zh: 我們為這些事作證， 神賜給順從的人的聖靈也為這些事作證。”

en: When they heard this, they were enraged and wanted to kill them.
zh: 公議會的人聽了，非常惱怒，就想要殺他們。

en: But a Pharisee in the council named Gamaliel, a teacher of the law held in honor by all the people, stood up and gave orders to put the men outside for a little while.
zh: 但有一個法利賽人，名叫迦瑪列，是民眾所尊敬的律法教師。他在公議會中站起來，吩咐人把使徒暫時帶出去，

en: And he said to them, "Men of Israel, take care what you are about to do with these men.
zh: 然後對大家說：“以色列人哪，你們應當小心處理這些人！

en: For before these days Theudas rose up, claiming to be somebody, and a number of men, about four hundred, joined him. He was killed, and all who followed him were dispersed and came to nothing.
zh: 從前有個丟大，自命不凡，附從他的人約有四百。他一被殺，跟從他的人盡都星散，一敗塗地。

en: After him Judas the Galilean rose up in the days of the census and drew away some of the people after him. He too perished, and all who followed him were scattered.
zh: 這人之後，在戶口登記的時候，又有一個加利利人猶大，拉攏人們來跟從他。後來他也喪命，跟從他的人也就煙消雲散了。

en: So in the present case I tell you, keep away from these men and let them alone, for if this plan or this undertaking is of man, it will fail;
zh: 至於目前的事，我勸你們不要管這些人，由他們吧！因為這計劃或這行動，如果是出於人意，終必失敗；

en: but if it is of God, you will not be able to overthrow them. You might even be found opposing God!" So they took his advice,
zh: 如果是出於 神，你們就不能破壞他們，恐怕你們是與 神作對了。”他們接受了他的勸告，

en: and when they had called in the apostles, they beat them and charged them not to speak in the name of Jesus, and let them go.
zh: 就傳使徒進來，鞭打一頓，禁止他們奉耶穌的名傳講，就把他們釋放了。

en: Then they left the presence of the council, rejoicing that they were counted worthy to suffer dishonor for the name.
zh: 使徒歡歡喜喜從公議會裡出來，因為他們算是配得為主的名受辱。

en: And every day, in the temple and from house to house, they did not cease teaching and preaching Jesus as the Christ.
zh: 他們天天在殿裡並在各人的家中，不斷地教導，傳講耶穌是基督。
